meanings.definition: a politically organized body of people under a single government
examples: the state has elected a new president
students who had come to the nation's capitol

meanings.definition: the territory occupied by a nation
examples: he returned to the land of his birth

meanings.definition: the people who live in a nation or country
examples: a statement that sums up the nation's mood
the news was announced to the nation

meanings.definition: an area outside of cities and towns
examples: his poetry celebrated the slower pace of life in the country

meanings.definition: a particular geographical region of indefinite boundary (usually serving some special purpose or distinguished by its people or culture or geography)
